name: Multiple injuries from one job accident - how compensated?
description: Per injury or combined impairment rating.[3]

mainEntity.name: Multiple injuries from one job accident - how compensated?

acceptedAnswer.text: Per injury or combined impairment rating.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Scheduled benefits for each body part or whole person impairment.[3] Key factors: (1) Combine ratings carefully; (2) Temporary total first; (3) Max medical; (4) No double-dip. Doctor rates impairment. Lawyer ensures full award.
